query: SELECT id, SUBSTRING(nomeCompleto, 1, 50) as nome, HEX(SUBSTRING(nomeCompleto, 1, 1)) as first_char_hex FROM employees WHERE deletedAt IS NULL ORDER BY nomeCompleto ASC LIMIT 5;
